name: Zombie Mission 13
description: The Zombie Mission series continues with its 13th episode in a completely different universe. Our heroes find a magical book and the fairy-tale world begins. Help our heroes to save the princess from hand of the evils. Bring her back to her beloved prince and get back to normal world! Many epic weapons, mechanics and vehicles await you in the new adventure. Rescue hostages, fight bosses and collect your daily rewards and make necessary improvements in the Store with the coins you earn in-game.
instructions: PLAYER 1 Move W A S D Hit C Mega Hit Hold C Key and Release Grenade V Reload X Jump W Walk on the wall Swimming Up Switch weapon Q-E Special Attack Q E When the bar is full PLAYER 2 Move ARROW KEYS Hit L Mega Hit
tags: 2 Player, 2 Player Games, Adventure, Battle, War, Zombie
